description_long: This is a classic red mailbox with a rounded top and a rectangular body, mounted on a single wooden post. The mailbox features a front access door with a small rectangular mail slot and embossed text, likely reading 'US MAIL.' A red flag is attached to the right side, which can be raised to signal outgoing mail. The surface of the mailbox is smooth and glossy, with subtle horizontal ridges along the sides for structural reinforcement. The post is a simple, vertical wooden beam that supports the mailbox above ground level. The overall design is functional and iconic, suitable for placement along suburban streets or in front of homes.
description: A red, rounded-top mailbox with a front door, side flag, and mounted on a wooden post. The surface is smooth and glossy, with embossed text and a mail slot on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mail slot, embossed text, and the end of the wooden post.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the raised red flag and the horizontal ridges on the mailbox body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curved back of the mailbox and the supporting post.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the mailbox profile and the absence of a flag on this side.
